booksSection.title: Books & Study Materials
booksSection.subtitle: Learn deeply with well-structured books and notes

books.title: Spoken English Mastery
books.shortDescription: A complete guide to improve spoken English with real-life examples.
books.longDescription: This book covers spoken English fundamentals, daily conversations, grammar basics, vocabulary building, and confidence techniques with exercises and practice sessions.

books.title: English Grammar Simplified
books.shortDescription: Understand English grammar in a simple and practical way.
books.longDescription: This book explains tenses, parts of speech, sentence formation, and common grammar mistakes with easy explanations and examples.

books.title: Interview Preparation Handbook
books.shortDescription: Crack HR and technical interviews with full confidence.
books.longDescription: This handbook includes HR questions, self-introduction tips, body language, confidence building, and mock interview techniques.
